summary: I am Muhammad Nabil Muyassar Rahman, a dedicated full-stack developer based in Central Jakarta, Indonesia, with advanced expertise in modern web development frameworks, including Next.js, NestJS, ExpressJS, Laravel, and Flask. Proficient in TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, PHP, and Java, I specialize in building high-performance, scalable software solutions that align with strategic business objectives.

My experience managing AWS and Proxmox infrastructures, alongside SQL and NoSQL databases, enables me to deliver robust systems that consistently surpass expectations. I’ve optimized critical workflows for the Pulau Intan Lestari modules and the Radar Banjarmasin Digital Website, significantly improving user experience and engagement. I aim to grow into a senior full-stack developer while laying the groundwork for a transformative tech startup to create innovative, globally impactful digital solutions.
